PC          Instruction         Machine Code
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
0x0000		addi s1,zero,10     00000000101000000000010010010011
0x0004		sub s2,s1,zero      01000000000001001000100100110011
0x0008		add s3,s1,s2        00000001001001001000100110110011
0x000c		sw s3,0(sp)         00000001001100010010000000100011
0x0010		beq zero,zero,0     00000000000000000000000001100011
